notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Aaron Ashby. Ian Happ scores. Nico Hoerner to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Brice Turang GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brice Turang grounds into a double play, first baseman Michael Busch to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Jackson Chourio out at 2nd. Brice Turang out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: William Contreras pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras pops out to first baseman Michael Busch in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Tyler Ferguson on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Garrett Mitchell pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Garrett Mitchell walks. Christian Yelich scores. Jackson Chourio to 3rd. Brice Turang to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Garrett Mitchell out at 2nd. Gary Sánchez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Garrett Mitchell out at 2nd. Gary Sánchez out at 1st.
